feed.title: Gabriel (Jiahui) Huang
feed.subtitle:
I'm a Research Scientist at [Adobe Research](https://research.adobe.com/), working on topics related to video processing and editing.
I live in the beautiful city of Vancouver, Canada 🇨🇦, where I previously received my Master's degree from [UBC](https://www.cs.ubc.ca/) under [Leonid Sigal](https://www.cs.ubc.ca/~lsigal/).
